message:
fix(float): Proper Python string formatting for test_float.py

- Type inference: str % anything → string (formatting operator)
- Codegen: Use runtime.pyStringFormat for variable format strings
- Runtime: Parse full Python format specs (%[flags][width][.precision]type)
- Handle NaN/inf with sign flags (+, space) in pyStringFormat
- Add tuple comparison support for assertEqual (BigInt vs int)
